suggested_context_updates.player_or_team: SAS vs MIN — Series Status and Wembanyama
suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: The season context documents SAS vs POR R1 (SAS wins 4-1) and notes Wembanyama as 'fully healthy entering R2. No injury concern.' There is no R2 series diary for SAS vs MIN.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News confirms SAS vs MIN is an active R2 series tied 2-2. Wembanyama elbowed Naz Reid, received his first career ejection, was reviewed for suspension, and was cleared by the NBA to play Game 5 with no further discipline. Anthony Edwards scored 36 points (16 in Q4) to lead MIN to a 114-109 G4 win and even the series. The 'Gobert/Wemby French Connection' headline confirms Gobert is active for MIN in this series.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Add SAS vs MIN R2 series diary. Series tied 2-2. Wembanyama was ejected in G4 for elbowing Naz Reid, reviewed for suspension, and cleared to play G5 (no further discipline). Edwards scored 36 in G4 win 114-109. Edwards appears healthy and active — update his injury status from the R1 left knee concern. Note Wemby ejection/elbow incident as a flagged disciplinary item to monitor.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: Playoff Injury Landscape states Edwards was 'OUT for G5 with severity still unclear' (left knee) and 'treat as a primary injury concern for G6; his availability and any potential minutes restriction are the most critical variables.' This was written in the context of the DEN-MIN R1 series.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News confirms Edwards scored 36 points (16 in Q4) in MIN's G4 R2 win vs SAS on 2026-05-11, playing a full and impactful game. He appears fully healthy and active in R2.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update Edwards' injury status: he is active and performing at a high level in R2 vs SAS (36 pts in G4). The R1 left knee concern appears resolved. Remove 'primary injury concern' designation and treat as healthy unless new information emerges.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: Playoff Injury Landscape states Wembanyama should be treated as 'fully healthy entering R2. No injury concern.' The WEMBANYAMA BLOWOUT EXEMPTION note does not mention any ejection or discipline history.

suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Add note to Wembanyama's player entry: received first career ejection in R2 G4 vs MIN for elbowing Naz Reid. Monitor for any recurrence or foul trouble elevation in subsequent games.
